data.title: Hershey Bites Into Better-For-You Snacking With LesserEvil Deal: Details
data.description: Hershey deepens its better-for-you snack strategy with a deal to acquire LesserEvil, known for organic popcorn and bold flavors. The acquisition enhances Hershey's growing savory snack lineup.

data.title: Iran-Backed Houthi Group Faces Sanctions On Cryptocurrency Wallets Funding War Efforts
data.description: The Treasury Department took action against a Houthi financial network, imposing sanctions on cryptocurrency wallets.

data.title: US Stocks Likely To Open Lower After The Worst Selloff Since 2020: Tariff Announcement Was '100% Smoot Hawley Disguised As Thoughtful Policy,' Says Expert
data.description: U.S. stock futures continued to decline on Friday after a bloodbath on Thursday following the introduction of Donald Trump's tariffs.
